name: Maura
message: Bears?! Also I can’t watch the videos lol. But if f you see a bear don’t record. Get away hahaha❤️

name: Lynda
message:
Hi! I saw your partners post on Instagram! 

For some reason your journey almost brings me to tears—what an incredible feat! As someone that is chronically ill and is incredibly connected to nature, I wish that I could do something as cool as this in my lifetime. I am cheering you on and rooting for you! Sending hugs, light, and good energy 🌟🩵🌿🪾🌞🐾🐝🐞🐞🌅⛰️

name: Jocelyn
message: Omg I came across this video and YOU GO GIRL !!! I hope you know you are inspiring a lot of people right now !! Stay safe and you got this !! 🩷🩷🩷🩷

name: William
message: You are incredible!! We’re all rooting for you. From Texas with love!

name: Claudia
message: Go girl!!❤️❤️ You’re an inspiration for everyone out there. Sending you love from Italy❤️
